name: Chili Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 can Whole kernel corn (7 oz), drained
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: St. Louis Post-Dispatch, 3/31/97
Preheat oven to 400°F.
Line an 8-inch square pan with foil, allowing it to overlap the top edge of the pan.
In a medium bowl, combine egg, milk, sugar, and cumin; beat well.
Add corn muffin mix; stir just until moistened.
Gently stir in corn and chilies.
Pour batter into prepared pan.
Bake 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
To serve, lift the corn bread from the pan using foil. Cut into squares and serve warm.
Yield: 4 large servings.
